'''Ruweln''' was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]], located in [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan space]].
